form.formComment: At the latest run favourite; won by 0.8 len at Broken Hill Cl1 March 28 over 1100m in soft going defeating First Feeling with 60kg at $1.24. form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of ten months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign post a big 4.5 len win. Moe 0 - 58 June 1 over 2088m slow track defeating Zeusmas with 56kg at $8.50. First up last campaign second of 10 at Balnarring Pic-Trpy December 7 2024 over 1600m, soft track; 4 len behind Diamanda with 64kg at $17. Expecting a strong run fresh.
